Monday

  • 6:00 AM - 7:00 AM: Fundamentals
  • 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM: Open Mat
  • 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM: Advanced BJJ

Tuesday

  • 6:00 AM - 7:00 AM: Drilling
  • 7:00 PM - 8:30 PM: Sparring

Wednesday

  • 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM: Lunch Randori
  • 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM: Gi Class

Friday

  • 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM: Open Mat (Gi & No-Gi)

Saturday

  • 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM: Competition Team (Private)
